theme: The 19th Hole — Vision Refresh + Phase 4 Roadmap

shots.title: Vision doc content refresh
shots.notes: Fixed all stale content in docs/vision.md: removed 'Planned' labels from shipped features (Metaphors, HTML Reports), updated signal source markers, fixed package descriptions, updated architecture diagram (22 commands, events table, orchestration tools, guard hooks), moved S7-S15 from Next to Shipped, added Phase 4 as Next, updated Later and Open Questions.

shots.title: Architecture diagram + CLI reference
shots.notes: Added CLI reference section to vision.md grouping all 22 commands into 7 categories: Scoring, Session, Reporting, Planning, Orchestration, Setup, Analysis. Architecture diagram was expanded in S16-1 with orchestration tools layer, guard hooks, and updated scoring engine capabilities.

shots.title: Phase 4 roadmap (S17-S20)
shots.notes: Created docs/backlog/roadmap-phase4.md with 4 sprints (S17: Plugin System, S18: PR Signals, S19: Dashboard, S20: Multi-Developer). Each sprint has 4 tickets with club selection, design decisions, risk assessment, and execution order. Marked roadmap.md (S7-S15) as complete with link to Phase 4.

shots.title: Backlog index + consistency pass
shots.notes: Updated docs/backlog/README.md with sprint entries S6-S16 (was only S3-S5), added roadmap table linking Phase 1-3 and Phase 4. Fixed README.md '20+ commands' to '22 commands'. Consistency pass verified zero stale Planned labels, correct command counts, sprint number agreement across all docs.

conditions.description: Docs-only sprint — no build/test needed, fast iteration

nutrition.description: No code changes — no build/test/typecheck needed for docs sprint
Commit-per-ticket discipline — 4 commits for 4 tickets, pushed after each
Comprehensive consistency pass: grepped for stale labels, verified cross-doc agreement
Zero code changes means zero regression risk. Vision doc brought up to date after 15 sprints of drift.

nineteenth_hole.how_did_it_feel: Clean and satisfying. The vision doc had accumulated significant drift over 15 sprints — 'Planned' labels on shipped features, '15 commands' when there are 22, S7-S15 described as future work. Everything is now aligned with reality.
nineteenth_hole.advice_for_next_player: The Phase 4 roadmap (S17-S20) covers all three 'Later' items from the vision doc: plugin system, local dashboard, shared hazard indices. S17 (plugins) is the critical foundation — start there. PR signals (S18) depend on plugin architecture for extensibility. The 'docs-only' sprint pattern works well for catching up documentation after intensive implementation phases.
nineteenth_hole.what_surprised_you: The scope of drift was larger than expected. The architecture diagram, package descriptions, signal source markers, roadmap section, open questions, and CLI counts were all stale. Systematic section-by-section editing was the right approach — trying to do it in one pass would have missed things.
nineteenth_hole.excited_about_next: Phase 4 is well-scoped: plugins (S17), PR signals (S18), dashboard (S19), multi-developer (S20). The plugin system will unlock community contributions. The dashboard will make SLOPE's data actionable for non-CLI users.

yardage_book_updates: docs/vision.md: Full content refresh — headers, signal markers, package descriptions, architecture diagram, roadmap section, open questions, CLI reference
docs/backlog/roadmap-phase4.md: New file — Phase 4 roadmap (S17-S20) with 16 tickets
docs/backlog/roadmap.md: Marked as complete, linked to Phase 4
docs/backlog/README.md: Backfilled S6-S16, added roadmap table
course_management_notes: 4 tickets, 4 in_the_hole — docs-only sprint, zero code risk
5 files modified: vision.md, roadmap-phase4.md (new), roadmap.md, backlog/README.md, README.md
Phase 4 roadmap covers all 3 'Later' items from vision doc
